Updated to
StreamFusion
Made by aquiloGG
Your all-in-one multi-platform streaming dashboard.
Twitch + YouTube + TikTok + Kick — unified chat, events, alerts, and analytics in a single window.
Follow aquilo on Twitch
Watch live
Connect Streamer.bot
Streamer.bot powers Twitch, YouTube, and Kick chat and events.

Don't have it yet?
Download Streamer.bot

Setup:
1. Open Streamer.bot
2. Go to Servers/Clients → WebSocket Server
3. Click Start and enable Auto-Start
4. Default address: 127.0.0.1:8080

SF auto-connects on launch. You can change the address in Settings → Connections.
TikTok via Tikfinity
TikTok doesn't have a public API, so SF uses Tikfinity as a bridge.

Don't have it yet?
Download Tikfinity

Setup:
1. Install & open Tikfinity (free)
2. Connect your TikTok account in Tikfinity
3. In SF, go to Settings → Connections
4. Enable Tikfinity and enter the port (default 21213)

TikTok chat, likes, follows, gifts, and shares will all flow into SF.
Chat & Moderation
Send messages — Click Chat in the toolbar, select platform(s), and type. Supports Twitch /commands (/ban, /timeout, /slow, /shoutout, etc.).

Search chat — Press Ctrl+Shift+F to filter messages by keyword or username.

Quick Send — Pre-save messages you send often (greetings, links, rules). Click Quick in the toolbar to access them.

Blocked users & keywords — Set highlight keywords and block noisy bots in Settings → Filters.
Events & Shoutouts
Click Events in the toolbar to open the events panel. Every follow, sub, raid, gift, tip, and cheer appears here in real-time across all platforms.

One-click shoutout — Each Twitch event has a Shoutout button. SF sends /shoutout username with a built-in 2-minute cooldown per user.

Quick Shoutout Picker — Press Ctrl+Shift+S to open a searchable list of current chatters. Use arrow keys or scroll wheel to pick a viewer, then press Enter to shoutout.

Pinned events — Big events (subs, raids, large cheers) auto-pin at the top so you don't miss them. They auto-clear when the stream ends.
Pop-out Overlay
Click Pop Out to launch a transparent, always-on-top chat overlay you can place over your game.

Lock/Unlock — Lock the overlay to make it click-through (mouse passes through to your game). Default hotkey: Ctrl+Shift+L.

Hide/Show — Toggle visibility with Ctrl+Shift+H without losing position.

Multi-monitor — SF remembers which monitor and position the overlay was on, and restores it next time.

The overlay shows chat, events, stats, goals, and has its own chat input & action hotbar.
Heads up: Games must be in Windowed or Windowed Borderless mode for the pop-out to show correctly. Exclusive fullscreen hides other windows, including this overlay.
Sounds, TTS & Alerts
Alert sounds — Built-in tones for follows, subs, raids, cheers, gifts, and tips. Upload custom sounds in Settings → Sounds.

Text-to-Speech — Click TTS in the toolbar to toggle. Toggle with Ctrl+Shift+T mid-stream. For best quality, install Windows Neural voices (Settings → Time & Language → Speech).

Visual alerts — Banner animations, confetti, screen shake for big events. The pop-out overlay gets matching visual effects.
Goals & Actions
Goals — Set follower/sub/tip goals in Settings → Goals. Progress bars appear in the main app and pop-out overlay.

Actions hotbar — Bind Streamer.bot actions to quick-fire buttons. Click Actions in the toolbar, then Edit Actions to set them up. Actions fire in the pop-out overlay too.
Discord Recap & Settings
Stream recap — When your stream ends, SF auto-generates a recap with top chatters, followers, subs, revenue, and highlights.

Discord webhook — Paste a webhook URL in Settings → Discord and enable auto-send. Your recap posts to Discord automatically after every stream.

Export/Import — Back up all your settings in Settings → About. Transfer your config to a new PC in one click.

Auto-updates — SF checks for updates on launch and notifies you when a new version is ready.
Support on Twitch
Every feature in StreamFusion is free for everyone — nothing here is locked behind payment.

If StreamFusion earns a spot in your stream, the best way to support development is a Twitch subscription. Totally optional — everything works without it.
You're ready to stream!
Open Settings () to configure connections, sounds, filters, goals, and more.

You can replay this guide any time from Settings → About → Setup Guide.

Connect your Twitch account

Sign in once with Twitch to unlock the features StreamFusion drives directly through your own Twitch app — no Streamer.bot setup required.

Hotkey actionsDrop VOD markers and run/snooze ads with global hotkeys, mid-game.
Create clipsClip your stream straight from the toolbar while live.
Native events (EventSub)Subs, bits, follows, raids & redeems straight from Twitch.
Stream info & moreFuture direct-Twitch features reuse this one connection.

StreamFusion never sees your password. Sign-in opens Twitch in your browser; only your account name and the scopes you approve are stored, encrypted, on this PC.

About
Twitch & YouTube
Chat, subs, raids, bits, Super Chats, memberships, viewer counts, and moderation all run through Streamer.bot. Sign in to Twitch and YouTube inside Streamer.bot once and StreamFusion picks up everything automatically. The optional Twitch account (direct) connection below adds clips, the native Raid Finder, and accurate EventSub events on top.
Twitch account (direct)
Sign in with your own Twitch app so StreamFusion can drive Twitch directly: clips from the toolbar, hotkey markers and ads, and accurate native events (EventSub) including hype trains and ad breaks. Raids, polls, predictions and stream info live in the Aquilo Dock inside OBS. Optional, and never required for chat. For the full walkthrough, open the Twitch sign-in screen.
Not connected
Sign in with Twitch to enable clipping and native events from StreamFusion.
Subs, bits, follows, raids, redeems, hype trains & ad breaks straight from Twitch via your OAuth, so SF doesn't lean on Streamer.bot for events. Deduped if SB is also connected. Needs a Twitch reconnect to grant the event scopes.
Sign in with browser
Log into Kick and YouTube through your browser — you're probably already signed in there, so it's one click. A tab opens on aquilo.gg; approve, then come back. TikTok has no login API, so just enter your @username and gifts/events get matched to you.

No username set — gifts/events won't be matched to you.

Enter your Kick channel slug to poll live viewer counts.

Rotation WidgetSong events from the Rotation widget or Jukebox
JukeboxNow-playing from aquilo.gg/jukebox
CountersCounter changes from aquilo.gg/counters
PenanceAuto push-ups from follows/subs/hype
Rotation Widget
Pipes now-playing + song requests from your Rotation widget at widget.aquilo.gg into the chat panel and OBS chat overlay. Free for everyone using both products.
Room key — get this from Rotation's config.html → "Connect to StreamFusion" button. Knowing the key = full access for that room, so keep it private.
Advanced — relay base URL
Override only if you've deployed your own relay. Default points at the Aquilo-hosted instance.
Jukebox
Mirrors now-playing + who requested it from your hosted Jukebox bot into the now-playing bar. No OBS, no Spotify login here — Jukebox reads Spotify in the cloud and this just displays it.
Jukebox dashboard → StreamFusion card → Copy the link, paste below. This one paste also lights up song requests in your Events tab (it fills the Rotation Widget room key for you).
Uses the same "Show now-playing bar" toggle as Rotation, above. Playback buttons stay off (the cloud feed is read-only — control songs from Jukebox chat commands).
Counters
Shows every change to your Counters (deaths, push-ups, etc.) as a row in the events feed — however you bump them (dock, Stream Deck, chat, or link). Read-only: this only watches counters, it never changes them.
Reuses your Jukebox read key automatically — connect Jukebox above and this just works. To use a different channel, paste a counter feed URL from aquilo.gg/bot below.
Penance — auto push-ups
Adds push-ups to your push-ups counter from stream events, while StreamFusion is open: follow +10 (Twitch/Kick/YouTube, each) · Twitch sub +15/+25/+35 (T1/T2/T3, resubs too) · Kick sub +20 · YouTube member +15 · gift subs count per gift (capped per bomb) · hype train +25/+50/+100 per level (L1–4/5–8/9+). Your push-ups→lifetime link keeps the lifetime total in sync.
Push-ups counter bump URL — on aquilo.gg/counters, open your push-ups counter and copy its Stream Deck / bump link (it has your key + &c=). This writes to the counter, so keep it private.
Gift-bomb cap (max push-ups per bomb)

Twitch
YouTube
TikTok
Kick
Test Triggers
Fire a sample event so you can see how it lands in the events panel, the pop-out overlay, and your OBS chat browser source. Useful for confirming a layout change or debugging "why doesn't this show up where I expect".
Reminders
Pop a reminder into the events panel — with its own sound — on a schedule. Trigger it by how long you've been live (run time) or at a set clock time. Great for "stretch", "hydrate", "shout out socials", or "raid soon". Run-time reminders only fire while you're live.
min
Event Filters
Bars & alerts checked = shown
Hide from the feed check an item to stop it showing
to languagecode: en, es, ja, pt…
Twitch
YouTube
TikTok
Kick
StreamElements / Tips
Third-party extensions
Events from any Streamer.bot source we don't recognize (custom integrations, etc.) are routed here. Crowd Control has its own section below.
Surfaces everything a third-party source emits — including bus/housekeeping traffic (Custom actions, reward/channel/stream updates) that's normally hidden. Great for wiring up a new integration; noisy otherwise. Overrides the mute above.
Crowd Control
Viewer effect triggers and Crowd Control coin exchanges (via the Crowd Control → Streamer.bot integration) land in the events feed as orange events.
Aquilo products
Happenings from aquilo.gg products (activity bus + Streamer.bot packs). Connect them under Settings → Integrations.
Stream control moved to the Aquilo Dock
Title & category (applied to Twitch, Kick and YouTube at once), ads, polls, predictions, VOD markers, the redemption queue and the Raid Finder now live in the Aquilo Dock — a panel inside OBS itself, so they sit next to your scenes instead of in this app. StreamFusion stays focused on what it does best: chat.
Set it up once: open the page below, sign in, and paste your dock URL into OBS via Docks → Custom Browser Docks.
Your global hotkeys for markers, ad snooze and ad runs (Hotkeys tab) still fire from here — those work mid-game with no UI needed.
Pre-stream checklist
Your go-live to-do list. It automatically unchecks itself each time you go live, so it is ready for the next stream.
Show rundown
Plan your stream as timed segments (Intro, main content, outro). Start the rundown and StreamFusion counts down each segment so you stay on schedule.
Analytics
Trends across every stream, combining Twitch, YouTube, Kick and TikTok (via Streamer.bot and TikFinity). A summary is saved automatically each time a stream ends. Stored only on this device.
Viewers
Everyone who chats gets a profile: messages, days seen, contributions, plus your own notes and tags. Click any name in chat (or a row here) to open their card. Stored only on this device.
Sound Alerts
Click Custom to use your own .mp3/.wav file instead of the built-in tone.

Keyword Match
Text to Speech
Uses your system's built-in speech voices. Install neural voices in Windows Settings → Time & Language → Speech for best quality (e.g. Microsoft Jenny Neural).
When off, emojis are stripped before TTS speaks.
When on, each new message cancels any in-progress TTS so the latest message is read instantly with no queue gap.
80%
110%
Speeds up both Browser TTS and TTS Monster playback. 110% = default, 200% = 2× faster.
Event TTS — Twitch
Event TTS — YouTube
Event TTS — TikTok
Only read gifts ≥coins
Set above 0 to skip small gifts. Example: 1000 reads only gifts worth at least 1,000 coins.
Event TTS — Kick
Aquilo products
Show happenings from aquilo.gg products in the live Events feed: scratch tickets, death counter, Vertibird drops, Boltbound, PvP and community check-ins via the activity bus, plus anything a Streamer.bot product pack reports. PunchCard check-ins and Jukebox song events already have their own integrations.
Streamer.bot product packs need no setup here: any custom event with source=aquilo + text lands in the feed automatically. Hide everything with the "Aquilo products" filter on the Events tab.
Discord Integration
Send a full stream recap (stats + contributor thanks) to Discord when the stream ends.
Discord Live-Announce
When you go live, post "🔴 Live now" to the same Discord channel. When the stream ends, SF auto-edits or deletes the message so your channel stays tidy.
Live message template — placeholders: {streamer} {game} {title} {url} {role}
When stream ends — placeholders: {streamer} {duration} {url}
Role to ping — Discord role ID (right-click role with Developer Mode on)
Use {role} in the live template to insert the @ping. Leave blank for no ping.
Aquilo Products
Companion products from aquilo.gg that register with this StreamFusion instance show up here. The Streamer.Bot kit and Spotify widget will appear automatically when installed and running.
No Aquilo products connected yet.
Spotify widget • Streamer.Bot kit • more coming
Auto-thank
Automatically post a thank-you in Twitch chat for new subs, cheers and gift subs. Off by default; sends through Streamer.bot with per-user + anti-flood cooldowns so it never spams. Placeholders: {user} {amount}.
Only thank cheers of at leastbits
Sub message
Cheer message
Gift message
Smart Shoutouts
When a Twitch chatter is themselves a live streamer, SF queues them in the Shoutouts toolbar button for one-click /shoutout. Auto-fire skips the click and dispatches as soon as a fellow streamer\u2019s detected.
Only raids bringing at leastviewers
Uses the same command template + exclude list below, and Twitch’s native /shoutout already shows the raider’s last category. Honors a 2-min per-user cooldown and won’t repeat a raider within a stream.
Shoutout command — placeholders: {target} {name}
Default uses Twitch\u2019s native /shoutout. Custom templates (e.g. !so {target} or Welcome @{target}!) are sent as plain chat.
Exclude these usernames — newline / comma / space separated
Stream Goals
Set targets for your stream session. Progress bars appear below your stats. Goals reset when you click Reset Stats.
PunchCard daily check-ins
Live daily check-ins from PunchCard (aquilo.gg/punchcard). Auto-refreshes every 15s while this tab is open.
Display
13px
Twitch Emotes
Connect to Streamer.bot to auto-load emotes.
Keyword Highlights
Messages containing these words are highlighted in gold.
Keyboard Shortcuts
Every StreamFusion shortcut, including the Quick Shoutout picker, is now editable on the dedicated page.
Pop-Out Overlay
When the pop-out is locked, clicks pass through to your game. Hold Ctrl at any time — even in a fullscreen game — to temporarily interact with the overlay. Release Ctrl to lock again.
SHOW ELEMENTS
PLATFORMS
APPEARANCE
100%
80%
13px
40
PRESET SIZES
Quickly resize the pop-out to fit different streaming setups. Position is preserved when resizing.
HOTKEY
Pop-out interact, hide / show, and send-chat hotkeys now live on the dedicated page, alongside every other StreamFusion shortcut.
Hotkeys
Bind any modifier + key combo (Ctrl+Shift+L), a lone F-key (F8), or a mouse side button (Mouse4 / Mouse5). Click a binding, press your combo, and it takes effect immediately. Press Esc to cancel. If a combo is already used by another StreamFusion hotkey you will be warned before it saves.
Pop-out interact toggle
Flips the pop-out overlay between click-through and interactive, even from inside a fullscreen game.
Pop-out hide / show
Temporarily hides the pop-out window from your own screen, then restores it to the exact same position.
Send chat from pop-out
Fires the pop-out Send button so you can reply without alt-tabbing. Optional, unbound by default. Keyboard combos only.
Quick shoutout picker
Opens a searchable list of current chatters for a fast shoutout.
Stream control actions
Bind clip, VOD-marker and ad actions to a global hotkey so you can fire them mid-game. (Polls, predictions and stream info moved to the Aquilo Dock in OBS.) Click a binding, press a key combo (Ctrl+Shift+M), a lone F-key (F13), or a mouse side button (Mouse4 / Mouse5).
Extra keyboard / mouse buttons (Logitech, Razer, etc.): Windows only distinguishes the two side buttons natively (Mouse4 / Mouse5). For G-keys, macro keys, or extra mouse buttons, open your device software (Logitech G HUB / Logi Options+, Razer Synapse, Corsair iCUE) and map each button to an unused combo. F13 to F24 are ideal since nothing else uses them, then bind those here.
Per-feature shortcuts
Quick-action hotbar slots and Stream Info quick-swap bindings are set where you build them, since each one points at a specific slot or favorite. Find hotbar slot keys on the hotbar editor, and Stream Info quick-swap keys under Stream Info → Hotkeys.
Demo Mode
Simulate a busy stream to preview how StreamFusion looks and feels — fake chat messages, follows, subs, gift bombs, cheers, tips, raids, and hype trains are pushed through the exact same pipelines as real events.

Tip: Open the pop-out window before starting demo mode to also see the overlay in action (shake, banners, toasts, hotbar).

Hotkey: Press Ctrl+Shift+D anywhere in the app to toggle demo on/off — handy for freezing the UI when capturing screenshots.
5
Idle. Toggle on to start emulating events.
Receipt Printer
Prints subs, gift bombs, bits, raids, redeems, Super Chats, Kicks, and TikTok gifts as styled receipts on an 80mm thermal printer — dithered avatar, platform badge, and real gift art included. TikTok gift streaks print once, at streak end, with the total.
—
EVENTS
FOLLOWS (paper-hungry — off by default)
PLATFORMS
MINIMUMS
Events below these values don't print (they still alert normally).
PRINT MY NOTE
Create a channel-point reward with this exact name (Twitch or Kick, “require viewer text” on). The viewer's note prints big — profanity-scrubbed — even when regular redeems are toggled off.
PRINT A MEME
Channel-point reward: the viewer's text becomes a meme search — the top Giphy result (pg-13) prints big and dithered. Query is profanity-scrubbed first.
SHIFT TICKET
Clock-in ticket for tonight: date, scheduled show + hours (from the aquilo.gg schedule), and current Twitch category. Prints even while printing is disabled.
SEASONAL THEME
Border decorations on every receipt (including PowerDeck / ScratchDrop / PunchCard prints). Auto follows the calendar: spring Mar–May, summer Jun–Aug, autumn Sep–Nov, winter Dec–Feb.
DOODLE APPROVALS
Viewer pixel doodles (drawn in the Twitch extension's Doodle tab) wait here. Nothing prints until you approve it; reject wipes it.
DOODLE PRICING
Charge viewers to submit a doodle. Off = free. When on, viewers spend Bolts (or Bits, once your extension has a Bits product with the SKU below). Rejected doodles refund the Bolts automatically. Bits require Bits-in-Extensions set up on Twitch.
WARDEN BRIDGE
Connect this machine to your Warden mod console. Relay lets mods see Kick / YouTube / TikTok chat in the unified feed; OBS control lets mods trigger the scenes and actions you allow below.
Scan to list your scenes and sources.
MODS MAY SWITCH TO (SCENES)
MODS MAY TOGGLE (SOURCES)
MODS MAY MOVE (CAMERAS / GROUPS)
MODS MAY MUTE (MICS)
MODS MAY ADJUST VOLUME (INPUTS)
MODS MAY CONTROL (MEDIA SOURCES)
MODS MAY REFRESH (BROWSER SOURCES)
MODS MAY TOGGLE (FILTERS)
MODS MAY FIRE (HOTKEYS)
DISCORD MIRROR
Every real receipt also posts its image to this webhook (test prints and system tickets stay local). Clear the field to disable.
Blocked Accounts
Messages from these usernames are filtered out across all platforms. Username matching is case-insensitive.
Customize on aquilo.gg
Overlay customization moved to the web
Every knob , theme, font, colors, animations, presets, TikTok gift placement, all of it , now lives at aquilo.gg/sf/customize. Changes save to this StreamFusion install automatically and persist across restarts. The page even shows a live preview of your overlay while you tweak.
Browser Source URLs
Paste these into OBS → Sources → + Browser Source. They load from aquilo.gg and connect back to this StreamFusion process for chat + events.
Chat Feed Recommended: 380 × 550
Alerts Banner Recommended: 700 × 200
Shoutout Card Recommended: 720 × 200
Vertical Bar Recommended: 380 × 720
Horizontal Ticker Recommended: 1920 × 80
Local 127.0.0.1:8787/<name> URLs still work too , they 302-redirect to the aquilo.gg versions, so existing OBS scenes don't need to be touched.
Accent & Background
Customize StreamFusion's look. Changes apply instantly and persist across sessions.
Pop-out Layout
Choose how the pop-out overlay renders. Applies to the transparent chat overlay (not the OBS browser sources).
Live Event Posts
Send a stylized Discord embed whenever one of these happens on stream. Share the recap webhook or use a separate channel like #stream-alerts.
Post when:
Gift thresholds:
gifted subs \u2014 fires Large gift subs
coins \u2014 fires Big TikTok gifts
Stream Records
Keeps a single message in a Discord channel updated with your all-time bests. Categories with no events yet are hidden from the post until they happen. Dedicated channel recommended (e.g. #records).
Community Sharing
Share your stream recap to the aquilo.gg community Discord in a dedicated channel. Great for connecting with other StreamFusion streamers and finding raid targets. Join the Discord →
Only the recap embed is sent; no chat history, tokens, or private data. Your Twitch / YouTube / TikTok handles are included so the community can find and support you back.
Streamer.bot Integration Events
When Streamer.bot sends events from these services, show them in the Events panel and fire the OBS alerts overlay.

Settings Backup
Export all settings (connections, goals, blocked users, sounds, layout) to a single JSON file. Import to restore on any machine.
Storage
Custom sounds stored: 0 — 0 KB
Diagnostics
Event trail last 50 alert-class events, received vs shown vs forwarded to overlay
If a missing event is not listed here at all, Streamer.bot / Twitch never delivered it (look at the Streamer.bot Twitch connection). If it shows received but never overlay, a StreamFusion filter dropped it. If overlay fired but it never appeared on stream, the drop is downstream (overlay / SSE).
